allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path src -Recurse -Include *.tsx,*.ts | ForEach-Object { $content = Get-Content $_FullName -Raw; $newContent = $content -replace ''bg-\\[#0b1220\\]'', ''bg-[var\(--app-bg\)]'' -replace ''bg-\\[#0B1220\\]'', ''bg-[var\(--app-bg\)]''; if \($content -ne $newContent\) { Set-Content -Path $_FullName -Value $newContent -NoNewline; Write-Host $_FullName } }")
